name: Gurney Bay Hotel, A PARKROYAL Partner Hotel
detail: One of the best hotels in Penang. Hotel is quite old nut you don't feel it at all as it well maintained and kept by staff. Location is really best near to Gurty walk with easy access to all the well known locations of the island. Car park is quite comfortable and there is always available parking bay.

name: Jazz Hotel Penang
detail: Highly recommended this less-than-a-year old new hotel in Penang. Spacious room with comfy bed & luxury bathroom (separate rain shower room & deep, big tub). Breakfast was gorgeous (2nd Floor) & lounge at 29th Floor is highly recommended if you love music & hang out with your loved ones. Didnt use the swimming pool & gym but the view from the rooftop is GREAT! Love the amenities in the bathroom. However, being concern on environmental issue, the management could consider to provide body soap, shampoo & conditioner in dispenser instead of mini tube to avoid creating more single-use plastic waste. Will be back to stay at Jazz Hotel again if going to Penang, provided the standard does not drop as time goes by.

name: Hompton by the Beach Penang
detail: Had a wonderful stay here in the newest trendy hotel in Penang. First impression was splendid as we were greeted at the lobby and shown the way to the reception on level 11. Why was the reception located at such a high level, you ask? Why, to take our breaths away with the glorious seaview, of course. The pool area was huge and airy, almost wanted to sleep there and forget about the room! But what a room it was! Spacious, elegantly designed with comfort at the top of their priority. Water pressure was great, amenities well provided, perfect room temperature and a wide window to let us further appreciate the beauty of Penang. Staff were so helpful and friendly, always checking in to see that our needs were met, engaging in conversation, made us feel very welcomed! Breakfast spread was excellent, food still hot and freshly prepared despite our lateness in waking. Again, the F&B staff were so attentive and friendly. Couldn't have enjoyed myself more! Highly recommended!

name: Hotel Penaga
detail: first time staying at peranakan boutique hotel in penang, i believe panaga is the best among all! when i first arrived at the hotel entrance, first sight of this old corner heritage building has already amazed me! designed by famous local architect hijjas kasturi, he make sure every corner of this hotel will suprise you! 3storey building, different theme disgin of every floor and every room! perfectly matching of old & new, give you such wonderful experince of stay! i like the traditional wooden blind window, allows perfect natural lighting shine into your room! try to request to stay on 3rd floor, extream high ceiling and nice deco. breakfast is awesome, especially the various of traditional nyonya kuih, ensure you fall into truly peranakan feeling. the small swimming is nice, best to chill yourself during hot weather.

name: Tune Hotel Georgetown Penang
detail: it's the first time i try to stay in Tune Hotel in Penang. i found very comfortable, clean and new room. Stay one to two nights is acceptable if you don't mind the room didn't got television. As i bring along my notebk, it only charges 12Rm for one day, it's acceptable for me. I found it's easy to walk around the hotel. nearby got Dr. sun yat sen Centre.u can discovery the history from there. and i eat very delicous chew gua teow in Kafe Heng Huat. totally, i stay in Penang for 3 days 2 nights. one night is other hotel costs me 115 Rm(on sale price),5 star. One night is in Tune hotel.It really 5 star hotel but only charges at 1 star price. Highly recommend u to stay in Tune hotel in Penang.

name: Carnarvon Suites
detail: By far one of the better 3-star hotels that I have stayed at. Very spacious room in a good location. Overall great, especially the manager that was helping me - Mr Syahril (not sure if I spelled his name correctly) Good points: 1) Room is really spacious (seriously) 2) Location is great for me at least as I mostly walk. Food - Kimberley Road, Penang Road - 5 mins. Touristy places all within 10-15 mins on foot - Clan jetties, Chinatown (Armenian Street area), Little India, etc. Komtar and Prangin Mall are also less than 10 mins away. If you take the Rapid Penang 401 bus to the airport, the bus stop is opposite the hotel (note it does not have the typical bus shelter you see on other roads, just a very small (broken) sign but the words PERHENTIAN BAS are painted on the road in very large yellow letters. Some other buses originating from the Jetty terminal pass by here on the way out - check the Rapid Penang website for routes/schedules. Almost all buses WILL stop at Komtar so you can head there to be sure. Gripes: 0) Hotel has no obvious sign - manager said they are working on it! Note that the Google Streetview picture is old (circa 2018). The hotel entrance is beside a corner shop selling duck rice/noodles (as of Oct 2020). Specifically, if you stand at the junction of Leboh Melayu/Carnavon and look towards Komtar (the very tall building) it is the second shop across the road (with roller shutters down) on the left side of a narrow lane. 1) Had a problem with the room (hint: during rain) but staff were very accommodating and managed to resolve the situation amicably. 2) Personally do not like the shower area design. The 1m partition does not really help keep water from splashing into the other areas of the admittedly very big bathroom. An interesting experience overall! Would stay here again if I return.

name: Cintra Muse Hotel
detail: Staff is great and a safe and quiet sleep is provided.

name: Chulia Mansion
detail: This new hotel in Chulia street offers a great location in the heart of the historical centre of George Town Penang. The room standard is very good. Clean comfortable and nice bed. I tried several hotels in Penang and this one is way better then any of the other ones I tried. The best price quality option in Penang for sure! Great is also that you get 2 free drinks at the roof terrace bar each evening! The owner and the staff their philosophy is to make the clients feel at home and the nice atmosphere at the bar really helps accomplishing that idea. I can highly recommend this hotel and will be back for sure!

name: St. Giles Wembley Penang
detail: St.Giles is tallest hotel in penang, view from our room is KOMTAR Building, and sea. My daughter love to stay in this hotel because they have free popcorn in reception. This hotel is very near to 1st avenue mall, and this mall connected to komtar and prangin mall, just walk turn right. If you turn left, we can get to GAMA supermarket, which have cheaper prices than others and also we can go to new lane food hawkers, macalister road zim sum which sell dim sum, atek durian...etc. Easy check in and check out. My daughter

name: SAVV Hotel
detail: I had a long day on 5July due to malfunction of aircond at other hotel and had no choice to search for a new accommodation last minute. And I am so glad that I found SAVV. They provide services that beyond excellences. Wan provide us some local dessert while arranging our room, despite our last minute booking and late check in. Front desk colleague to the security guard at ground floor all are super friendly and they notice you right away and offer helps immediately. Housekeeping go extra miles to touch up your room cleanliness when I only requested to clear off the extra bed. This hotel is definitely a new Gem in Georgetown area. It is a hidden garden in the town and the spacious lovely room with Penang bridge view. I will definitely be back in the future with my new born baby and hope to meeting all this great people working here once again. Thank you so much for such a beautiful memories provided. Keep it up team!
